description:
## Destination

Claude Code is wired to SuperWhisper on all my Macs, declaratively in Nix: SuperWhisper installed via a Homebrew cask gated behind a new `voice` feature; the reference integration's attention/completion hooks, the per-project toggle skill, and a statusline on/off indicator all ported into the Nix-managed Claude Code config; then built and activated. Reference: github.com/superultrainc/superwhisper-claude-code.

## Notes

- **Execution IS carried into this map** (user chose 'decisions locked, then build'): the map ends with a real build+activate task, not just a handoff.
- **Scope (all in):** core attention/completion hooks + per-project toggle skill + statusline indicator.
- **Coupling = Independent:** `voice` installs the cask on all Macs; the Claude Code hooks only take effect where claude-code is already enabled (today: firefly/work Macs, via darwin-modules/policy/firefly.nix). Do NOT broaden claude-code to non-firefly Macs.
- **No plugin marketplace.** The reference installs via `claude plugin install`; this repo manages settings declaratively (home-modules/settings/programs/claude-code.nix, disableBundledSkills=true). Port hooks into settings.hooks instead.
- Skills to consult per session: /grilling, /domain-modeling, /prototype, /research. Repo conventions: CLAUDE.md (structural vs content features), CONTEXT.md, docs/adr/.
- Relevant files: darwin-modules/features/{default,music,llm,tailscale}.nix, darwin-modules/apps/default.nix (casks), home-modules/settings/programs/claude-code.nix (settings.hooks + statusline), home-modules/claude-skills.nix, modules/hosts.nix + modules/content-features.nix (feature seam).
- Memory: TCC-gated macOS tools (mic/accessibility) go via Homebrew, not nix — aligns with the cask choice.

## Decisions so far

<!-- one line per closed ticket, linking it -->

- **Verify SuperWhisper's claude-hook binary and its interface** (nix-4t3.1) — hook = `/Applications/superwhisper.app/Contents/Resources/claude-hook` (cask installs .app to /Applications); a 56-byte shim into the `agent-hook` Mach-O binary. Reads Claude hook JSON, wires 5 events (Stop/Notification/PreToolUse:AskUserQuestion/PermissionRequest/UserPromptSubmit), fires `superwhisper://agent-update` deeplink. **Gating is real in the binary** via `/tmp/superwhisper-agent/disabled-<md5($PWD)>`; `SUPERWHISPER_AGENT=0` is display-only (statusline) → toggle skill must write the /tmp file. Details: docs/research/superwhisper-claude-hook.md.
- **Model the voice feature: structural vs content** (nix-4t3.2) — `voice` is a **structural** feature: registered in nebula.features (hosts.nix), added **explicitly per-Mac** to spectre+ash (greppable, opt-out-able), wired `voice.enable = machine.features.voice` in darwin-modules/features/default.nix via a new **darwin-modules/features/voice.nix** (mirrors music/llm). That module owns the **whole** integration (cask + hooks + statusline) under `mkIf cfg.enable`. **Independence:** voice contributes claude-code settings unconditionally but **never sets claude-code.enable** — inert wherever claude-code is off (settings.json write is enable-gated). Cask→all Macs; hooks→firefly Macs only.
- **Design the voice darwin module: cask + hook wiring** (nix-4t3.3) — new **darwin-modules/features/voice.nix** (mirrors music/llm): `homebrew.casks=["superwhisper"]` + `user.programs.claude-code.settings.hooks` under `mkIf cfg.enable`. **Hook target = direct `/Applications/superwhisper.app/Contents/Resources/claude-hook`** (no nix wrapper). **All 5 reference hooks** ported (Stop/Notification/PreToolUse:AskUserQuestion/PermissionRequest/UserPromptSubmit — same command, binary dispatches). Merge is safe: `settings` is `pkgs.formats.json` (freeform recursive-merge), so voice hooks coexist with WorktreeCreate/Remove. `.claude/settings.local.json` write **accepted, no handling** (runtime per-project file). Blueprint: docs/research/voice-darwin-module-design.md.
- **Design the per-project SuperWhisper toggle skill port** (nix-4t3.4) — real repo file **home-modules/skills/superwhisper/SKILL.md** (`/superwhisper [on|off]`), placed by voice.nix via `user.home.file...source` under `mkIf voice.enable`. Faithful port: writes/removes **/tmp/superwhisper-agent/disabled-<md5($PWD)>** — the exact convention the binary reads (dictated, not chosen; nix-4t3.5 statusline must match). Gates **real** hook behavior (confirmed nix-4t3.1). Extends 'one module owns the integration'.
- **Design the statusline SuperWhisper indicator** (nix-4t3.5) — model the statusline as **composable segments** (new module **home-modules/claude-statusline.nix**, option `programs.claudeStatusline.segments` = listOf `{priority;text;runtimeInputs}`, joined by ' · '). claude-code.nix contributes model+ctx as the base segment (priority 10); **voice.nix** adds the SW segment (priority 90) under `mkIf voice.enable` — absent on linux/non-voice Macs via the module gate. Segment hashes `.workspace.current_dir` to track `disabled-<md5(cwd)>`. **Revises the 4t3.2 note:** statusline is a shared segmented surface; voice owns its segment. Blueprint: docs/research/voice-statusline-design.md.
- **Build and activate the voice integration** (nix-4t3.6) — implemented (jj d35b5d78, 6 files): new **darwin-modules/features/voice.nix** (cask + hooks + skill + statusline segment) and **home-modules/claude-statusline.nix** (segmented statusline); statusline moved out of claude-code.nix; `voice` wired in features/default.nix + registered on spectre/ash. **Built + validated on ash** (nix build .#darwinConfigurations.ash.system OK; statusline live: 'Opus 4.8 · … · ✓ superwhisper', toggle flips to ✗; all 5 hooks merged). **Activation handed off to user** (home-manager switch --flake .#ash-yann for user-space; darwin-rebuild switch --flake .#ash for cask) + manual TCC Mic/Accessibility grant.

## Not yet specified

- TCC permissions (CONFIRMED needed): SuperWhisper app needs **Microphone + Accessibility** grants, manual via System Settings — not hook-level, not Nix-configurable. Likely a manual checklist in nix-4t3.6 rather than config. Revisit during the build.
- (resolved) superwhisper://agent-installed deeplink NOT mirrored — a one-time install ping, not worth reproducing in declarative Nix.

## Out of scope

- Broadening the claude-code darwin module to non-firefly Macs (coupling chosen: Independent).
- Installing via the Claude Code plugin marketplace (`claude plugin install`) — replaced by declarative Nix wiring.
title: Voice: wire Claude Code to SuperWhisper on all Macs
